description.value: No immediate damage, no ablation. Inflicts Sleep status. DV13 Resist Torture/Drugs Check (Physical for most mooks);on fail falls Prone (see pg. 169) and unconscious for 1 minute.. Lasts for 10 triggers/10 rounds/5 minutes/until an antidote is administered. New application refreshes the timer. Once the target is asleep, they no longer attempt the checks and remain unconscious for 1 minute in combat, 1 hour out of combat, until non-status-effect damage is taken, or until they're woken up as an action. Once woken, if enough time hasn't passed, they may be at risk of falling back asleep!
